Michael blinked a few times as his eyes readjusted.
He looked around his room and noticed that everything was now various shades of pastel. The wardrobe that he was standing in front of was now filled with various items of feminine clothing.
Finally Michael looked down at himself and was a little disappointed to find that his body hadn't physically changed, but he was no wearing a yellow sun dress and a pair of white socks. He could feel a bra around his breast-less chest and assumed that he was also wearing panties, which he confirmed to be yellow with a small bow on the front when he hiked up the front of his dress to get a better look.

He looked around and found a mirror. He was disappointed once again to find that he saw himself as normal, but now wearing girl's clothing.

He pressed the button on the remote and said "physically change me into a girl" suddenly a readout popped up on the holographic screen

PHYSICAL CHANGES IN ALPHA TESTING STAGE, IT IS NOT RECOMMENDED TO PROCEED

WOULD YOU LIKE TO PROCEED? RESULTS MAY NOT BE AS EXPECTED

Does Michael decide to try out a physical change, or does he feel as though it's a bit too dangerous? Maybe he could just try changing his reflection for now.
1553311.title: He changed how everyone perceived his gender

choices: Swap lives with a person he knows
See reality through a pet's perspective
15533113.content: Maybe changing reality so that he could experience it through someone else's eyes?
15533113.title: Something else

1553312.content:
Hmm... Changing my age could be fun Michael thought, pressing the button.

"Make it so that everyone things I'm..."
1553312.title: He changed his everyone perceived his age

choices: Leave it up to the device to decide
15533121.content:
...Younger" Michael decided.

The holographic display flashed up with a message.

REQUEST IS VAGUE. RESULTS COULD VARY

CONTINUE WITH REQUEST OR SPECIFY EXACT PARAMETERS?

Will Michael leave the decision up to the remote, or choose himself?
15533121.title: Younger

choices: Play it safe and just shave off a couple of years
155331211.content: Already being a teenager he could try being a pre-teen again, or maybe something younger? Then again, remaining a teenager and just shaving off a few years could be interesting enough, at least for an initial test?

Why not make it really interesting and see what this can really do.

How much younger would Michael like to go though?

15533121132.content: Before confirming his choice, Michael had a thought... As if becoming a toddler wasn't crazy enough, he could try being a toddler from the opposite gender's point of view... Or is that going too far for a test?
15533121132.title: Toddler

155331211321.content:
"make me into a three year old girl" Michael inputted into the machine.

The ring around the button slowly filled in as the new reality was compiled and then there was a flash.

Michael blinked and looked around, taking in his new environment.
He quickly realised that he was sitting in a playpen surrounded by toys wearing a denim dress designed for a young girl (https://xcdn.next.co.uk/COMMON/Items/Def... ) ,though strangely he noticed his normal legs poking out of the dress rather than those of a 3-year-old girl's. In fact everything had been sized to fit his normal body, including the playpen.

I guess reality changes around me, but there's no physical changes Michael thought.

His next thought was how comfortable he felt just sitting on the floor, which he quickly realised was because of the padding on his bottom. Pulling up his denim dress revealed that he was wearing pink, princess pull-ups (https://3.bp.blogspot.com/-z_0cfx_3XHs/U...)
Blushing slightly, Michael pulled his dress back down. Well that's embarrassing, hopefully I'm still potty trained

Upon further inspection of his surroundings he noticed that the remote was sitting next to him amongst his toys.

What does Michael do next?
155331211321.title: Screw it, let's see what this thing can do ...

1553312113211.content:
Suddenly Michael's mother came in from the kitchen. Michael instinctively tried to hide himself as much as he could, embarrassed about how he looked. But his mother took no notice.

"How's my little princess doing?" She cooed as she came over to the playpen, "are you ready for some lunch?"

Michael nodded, slowly relaxing, clearly she saw him as a little girl now.
Michael's mother reached into the playpen and pulled him out, with seemingly no problem! Wow, I guess the reality switch had changed a fair bit!

She took Michael on her hip into the kitchen and locked him in a high chair designed for someone of his size. She then attached a bib around his neck and placed a sippy cup on the tray.

Michael absent-mindedly picked up the sippy cup and began to suckle on it while his mother brought his food over.

Does she feed Michael or is he a big enough girl to do it himself?
1553312113211.title: Michael's mother comes in

choices: Screw it, let's go all out and see life from a baby girl's perspective
This is probably a big enough change already
15533121133.content: Before confirming his choice, Michael had a thought... As if being seen as a baby wasn't crazy enough, he could try being a baby from the opposite gender's point of view... Or is that going too far for a test?
15533121133.title: Baby

155331211331.content:
"make me a baby girl" Michael inputted I to the machine.

The ring around the button slowly filled in as the new reality was compiled and then there was a flash.

He blinked and looked around, taking in his new environment.

Michael now seemed to be surrounded by wooden bars, which he quickly assumed to be the bars of a crib.
Surprisingly though, the crib, and everything else in the room seemed to be sized for an adult. He looked down and noticed that he didn't have the body of a baby, he was just dressed like one.
I guess the remote doesn't change people physically, just the world around me? Michael thought, looking over his new clothes. He was wearing a pink onesie, with a pacifier clipped to the front and a bulge that suggested that he was wearing a diaper underneath. Michael blushed a little at that

Suddenly he realised that he didn't have the remote in his hand and began to panic, but the panic was short lived as he found it next to him wrapped in the sheets.

Now what? He realised that the bars were high enough that he probably wouldn't be able to escape his new prison himself, but he could always try.

Does Michael attempt to climb out of the crib, or try to call out for attention? Or perhaps Michael decides to use the remote again.
155331211331.title: Screw it, let's go all out and see life fro...

Request is vague. Results could vary.
Continue with request or specify exact parameters?

What did Michael decide to do?
15533132.title: Be perceived as an animal

choices: ...some kind of pet (dog, cat, hamster, canary, ect.)
...some kind of farm animal (horse, pig, goat, cow, ect.)
...some kind of Zoo animal (lion, tiger, gazelle, elephant, giraffe, ect.)
155331321.content:
'I think I'd better be specific about this', thought Michael. 'I don't want to be percieved as something random, like a housefly, if I don't want to.'

The question now was: what kind of animal should he choose to be perceived as?

After some thinking, Michael decided on being perceived as a...
155331321.title: Be more specific

1553313212.content:
Michael decided to be percieved as a farm animal. He wasn't quite sure were this sudden urge came from, but the more he thought about it, the more fun it seemed to be.

What would the new reality be like for him if he was percieved as something that wasn't even human?
Would he still go to school? Would he still wear clothes, or would he be naked? Would he eat animal food? Would he even be able to walk on two legs?

These questions were begging to be answered and Michael was the one that could answer them. The only question was what kind of farm animal he should be percieved as...
1553313212.title: ...some kind of farm animal (horse, pig, goat, ...

15533132121.content:
After carefully thinking it over, Michael decided that he wanted to try to be percieved as a horse. It seemed to him to be the most interesting farm animal to be percieved as.

Pressing the button on the device, Michael said clearly: "I wish to be percieved as a horse."

There was a few beeps from the device before another holographic message was shown.

Request understood. Please specify age and gender as well.

Michael became more interested at that message. Sure; he wanted to be percieved as being a horse, but this gave him a few more options than he had thought at first.
He could choose to be percieved as a foal or as a fully grown horse, of either gender!

Michael decided to choose what age he wanted to be percieved as, first.
15533132121.title: An Equine (stallion/mare)

155331321212.content:
Michael decided that he wanted to be percieved as a fully grown horse. True; it might be funny to be percieved as a foal, but he wanted to try out being percieved as a 'grown-up' at first.
All he had to do now was to choose what gender he wanted to be percieved as, too.

But, that was where Michael hesitated. He suddenly thought about certain things that could put him in very awkward positions. He wasn't quite sure how much the device would alter reality, after all...

If he were to be percieved as a stallion, then, depending on how much reality would change, he might be expected to breed with a mare! And since the device wouldn't physically change him, he could end up in a very unfortunate situation...

And, if he decided to be percieved as a mare... Michael shuddered at the mental image he got of himself being 'penetrated' by an enormous equine 'rod'.

And then there was the fact that he might end up having to be ridden by other people, no matter the gender of horse he would end up being percieved as!

Suddenly, the thought of being percieved as a horse didn't seem as fun as used to. Of course, that would all depend on how exactly the device would change reality; there was still a chance that he could still have his normal life, just slightly altered to suit what he was being percieved as.

In the end, Michael decided to go on with it. There was no reason to worry before the changes had even taken place. Pressing the button on the device once more, he told it the age and gender of horse he wanted to be percieved as.
155331321212.title: A fully grown horse

155332.content:
Wow there it was "the device" looking closely it was just a ring with an inscription on the inner surface "the ultimate dispenser"

Your visual inspection had not reveal how the devise worked.

You turned the ring and placed it on your index finger on your right hand, and turned it to face upward.

As stared at the smooth green stone on the front of the ring you are hit by a flash of green light.

Your brain is filled with "Important Information", a list of instructions describing how the ring works.
155332.title: The powder infinity dispenser...
